message.content:
@startuml
actor Admin as Admin

interface :RemoveScooterUI as RemoveScooterUI

interface :RemoveScooterScooterController as RemoveScooterScooterController

interface :PharmacyService as pharmServ

interface :PharmacyDB as pharmDB

interface :ScooterService as scootServ

interface :ScooterDB as scootDB

rectangle RemoveScooterUI
    1 Sends a request regarding the update of an electric scooter's data
    2 showPharmacies()
    3 create()
    4 create()
    5 IstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
    6 IstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
    7 Shows the list of pharmacies and asks to choose one
    8 Chooses the pharmacy
    9 showScooterList(pharmacyId)
    10 create()
    11 create()
    12 IstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
    13 IstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
    14 Shows the list of electric scooters and asks to choose one
    15 Chooses the electric scooter
    16 Shows the information about the scooter, asking to update
    17 Updates the information
    18 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus, potency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
    21 Validates all the information, informing of the success of the operation
endrectangle

rectangle RemoveScooterScooterController
    19 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus, potency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
    20 updateScooterFromDB(batteryPerc, chargingStatus, potency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
endrectangle

rectangle pharmServ
endrectangle

rectangle pharmDB
endrectangle

rectangle scootServ
endrectangle

rectangle scootDB
endrectangle

rectangle ref
    SD_CONNECTIONS
endrectangle

Admin -> RemoveScooterUI: 1
RemoveScooterUI -> RemoveScooterScooterController: 2
RemoveScooterScooterController -> pharmServ: 3
pharmServ -> pharmDB: 4
pharmDB -> RemoveScooterScooterController: 5
RemoveScooterScooterController -> pharmServ: 6
pharmServ -> pharmDB: 6
pharmDB -> scootServ: 11
scootServ -> scootDB: 13
scootDB -> RemoveScooterScooterController: 19
RemoveScooterScooterController -> scootServ: 20
scootServ -> scootDB: 20
scootDB -> RemoveScooterScooterController: 21
RemoveScooterScooterController -> Admin: 21

@enduml
